# TryIT Educations - AI Agent Summary
# https://tryiteducations.net

## About
TryIT Educations is India's most complete competitive exam preparation platform.
Serving students from Class 1 to PhD and all government competitive exams.

## Key Features
- 1,10,000+ exam pathways across India
- 42 Indian languages supported
- All 28 states and 8 UTs covered
- 7-layer AI explanations per question
- Real All-India rankings after every test
- Mentor coaching system
- Institution management portal
- Family progress dashboard

## Supported Exams
UPSC CSE, SSC CGL, IBPS PO, TNPSC Group 1, RRB NTPC, NEET UG, JEE Main,
State PSCs (all 36), School Board (Class 1-12), College Entrance, GATE, NDA, CDS

## Languages
Tamil, Hindi, English, Telugu, Malayalam, Kannada, Bengali, Marathi, Gujarati,
Odia, Punjabi, Assamese, and 30 more Indian languages

## Pricing
- Free: PYQ questions, daily current affairs, 5 explanations/6 hours
- Pro: Rs 999/year — unlimited questions, AI explanations, all games
- Ultra: Rs 1499/year — concept learning, mentor access, all 24 pathways

## Contact
founder@tryiteducations.net
tryiteducations.net
